_TEMPLATE: Copy this file, rename it to {slug}.json, and fill in the fields below.
notes: Describe what this bookmarklet does and any CI-specific caveats.

checks.text_contains: REPLACE with a string from the modal title

checks.comment: At least one strong element with content

_check_type_reference.modal_appears: Waits for an element or text to be visible. Use 'text_contains' OR 'selector'.
_check_type_reference.text_present: Finds elements by 'selector', checks combined text against 'text_pattern' (regex).
_check_type_reference.element_count: Checks that at least 'min_count' elements match 'selector'.
_check_type_reference.no_js_errors: Fails if any uncaught JS exceptions were thrown. No extra fields needed.
_check_type_reference.network_request: Fails if no captured request URL matches 'url_pattern' (regex).
_check_type_reference.page_redirected: Fails if current page URL does not match 'url_pattern' (regex) after execution.
